Description: "Moved black core sphere to the transparent render queue by setting transparent=true, allowing it to render after the accretion disks (renderOrder=4 vs 1,2,3) and correctly overwrite the disk's overlapping pixels."
Instruction: "Add transparent={true} and opacity={1.0} to the black core sphere's meshBasicMaterial."
ReplacementContent:
"      {/* ══ 5. Black core sphere (writes depth, renderOrder 4) ══ */}
      <mesh renderOrder={4}>
        <sphereGeometry args={[0.65, 64, 64]} />
        <meshBasicMaterial color="#000000" transparent={true} opacity={1.0} depthTest={true} depthWrite={true} />
      </mesh>"
TargetContent:
